proposal_summary: A proposal for the Uniswap community to allocate 500k UNI to the Protocol Guild Pilot, an initiative that rewards Ethereum core protocol contributors through a vested split contract over a 1-year period to align incentives and support infrastructure maintenance.

disclosed_entities.name: Protocol Guild
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This is a proposal for the Uniswap community to support important Ethereum Public Goods through the Protocol Guild

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap Treasury
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: We are inviting the Uniswap community to be part of this inaugural Pilot in the form of a 500k UNI transfer to the Protocol Guild’s vesting contract.

disclosed_entities.name: ChicagoDAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: ChicagoDAO is partnering with Protocol Guild to bring this proposal to the Uniswap community!

claimed_actions.raw_action: Transfer 500k UNI to the Protocol Guild’s vesting contract
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Support the ongoing work of core contributors in the Protocol Guild Pilot.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: We are inviting the Uniswap community to be part of this inaugural Pilot in the form of a 500k UNI transfer to the Protocol Guild’s vesting contract.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal asks for a simple transfer of UNI tokens to a specified external vesting contract.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: We are inviting the Uniswap community to be part of this inaugural Pilot in the form of a 500k UNI transfer to the Protocol Guild’s vesting contract.

limitations: No specific target on-chain execution details are provided aside from the destination address.
